contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Velocity rollout: first snapshot + weekly GitHub Action + Restock Recommender historical view
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse-inventory/pull/5
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/82
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/83
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/187
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/65
  
  Details:
  Operationalized partners-velocity.json: ran the script for the first live snapshot, wired it into a weekly GitHub Action, exposed the data in the Restock Recommender DApp page, and parked the deferred follow-ups in agentic_ai_context.
  
  What changed:
  
  agroverse-inventory (PR #5): committed first partners-velocity.json snapshot — 24 QR Code Sales rows, 345 Inventory Movement rows, 18 partners with non-empty velocity data across 7 SKUs with category medians.
  
  go_to_market / market_research:
  - PR #82: new .github/workflows/publish-partners-velocity.yml — Mondays 06:45 UTC scheduled run that re-executes sync_partners_velocity.py and pushes to TrueSightDAO/agroverse-inventory using the same secrets / commit-only-if-changed pattern as the daily inventory snapshot workflow.
  - PR #83: bug fix in sync_partners_velocity.py. INV_VALID_STATUSES was {"NEW"} but actual rows on the Inventory Movement tab are stamped PROCESSED once applied to ledgers; filter rejected every real row. Extended to {"NEW", "PROCESSED"}. Verified live: 0 rows -> 345 rows.
  
  dapp (PR #187): restock_recommender.html now displays a "Historical activity" panel under the partner selector. Fetches partners-velocity.json from raw.githubusercontent once, caches client-side, renders per-SKU monthly velocity + 30d/90d counts + last activity (relative age, red highlight if >90 days stale) + sample size + comparison to category median. Picks sales_* for Consignment partners, restocks_* for Wholesale.
  
  agentic_ai_context (PR #65): added two pending entries to OPEN_FOLLOWUPS.md — the eyeball-check after 4 weekly refreshes (acceptance gate for trusting the numbers, earliest 2026-05-25) and the dormant / high-velocity wiring into the warm-up draft generator (blocked on the eyeball-check going green).
  
  Pull requests:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse-inventory/pull/5
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/82
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/83
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/187
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/65
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
